```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor<<Highlight>> Gold
    BackgroundColor LightYellow
    BorderColor Gray
    ArrowColor Gray
}
skinparam note {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
}

title UML Diagram: Class DimensionComponent in Context

note as Hints
**Hints**
- Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
- Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
- The arrows of the inheritance tree are <color:orange>colored</color>.
end note

class DataStructureComponent {
    identifier : Identifier
    semantic : PairedControlledVocabularyEntry
    specialization : SpecializationRole
}

note left of DataStructureComponent
Class has 8 associations.
Only 3 are shown here.
end note

class "Components::\nDimensionComponent" as DimensionComponent <<Highlight>> {
    categoricalAdditivity : Boolean
}

class "DataDescription::\nDataStructure" as DataStructure <<Rectangle>>
class "DataDescription::\nDataPoint" as DataPoint <<Rectangle>>
class "Conceptual::\nRepresentedVariable" as RepresentedVariable <<Rectangle>>

class "KeyValue::\nMainKeyMember" as MainKeyMember <<Rectangle>>
class "Dimensional::\nDimensionalKeyMember" as DimensionalKeyMember <<Rectangle>>
class "Representations::\nValueDomain" as ValueDomain <<Rectangle>>

DataStructureComponent <|-- DimensionComponent #Orange

DataStructure -left-> DataStructureComponent : has
DataPoint -up-> DataStructureComponent : correspondsTo
RepresentedVariable -up-> DataStructureComponent : isDefinedBy

MainKeyMember -up-> DimensionComponent : isBasedOn
DimensionalKeyMember -up-> DimensionComponent : isBasedOn
ValueDomain -up-> DimensionComponent : isStructuredBy

hide methods
hide <<Rectangle>> circle
hide <<Highlight>> circle
hide DataStructureComponent circle

@enduml
```
